title: Philbrick's Field Notebook
description: Ethan Philbrick's personal field notebook contains a complete copy of the daily bore log in his own hand, including the original Well_Drill_Torque baseline reading of 41 recorded six days ago. The notebook also shows his notation from this morning: 'brake collar — adjusted? — check with B.W.' — evidence that Philbrick noticed the discrepancy and flagged it, at least to himself, before anyone else thought to look.
